records.question: What female students aged 18 or older with the last name Smith have an advisor number of at least 1121 and play games for exactly 1 hour?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
WHERE student.advisor >= 1121 AND student.sex = 'F' AND plays_games.hours_played = 1 AND student.age >= 18 AND student.lname = 'Smith'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 WHERE T1.Advisor >= 1121 AND T1.Sex = 'F' AND T1.Age >= 18 AND T1.LName = 'Smith' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Plays_Games AS T2 WHERE T1.StuID = T2.StuID AND T2.Hours_Played = 1)

records.question: Which female students named Jandy Nelson, aged 20 with advisor 9172, living in BAL, majoring in 600 or fewer, have played games for at least 50 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
WHERE student.city_code = 'BAL' AND student.fname = 'Jandy' AND student.sex = 'F' AND student.major <= 600 AND student.age = 20 AND plays_games.hours_played >= 50 AND student.advisor = 9172 AND student.lname = 'Nelson'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 WHERE T1.city_code = 'BAL' AND T1.Fname = 'Jandy' AND T1.Sex = 'F' AND T1.Major <= 600 AND T1.Age = 20 AND T1.Advisor = 9172 AND T1.LName = 'Nelson' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Plays_Games AS T2 WHERE T1.StuID = T2.StuID AND T2.Hours_Played >= 50)

records.question: Which students majoring exactly in 600 play Lacrosse?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE student.major = 600 AND sportsinfo.sportname = 'Lacrosse'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN SportsInfo AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID WHERE T1.Major = '600' AND T2.SportName = 'Lacrosse'

records.question: Which male students named Derek Lee have a major of 600 and an advisor number at most 2192?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
WHERE student.lname = 'Lee' AND student.advisor <= 2192 AND student.fname = 'Derek' AND student.major = 600 AND student.sex = 'M'
records.pred_sql: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE LName = 'Lee' AND Advisor <= 2192 AND Fname = 'Derek' AND Major = 600 AND Sex = 'M'

records.question: Who are the students named Linda Smith majoring in 600 or more, playing Athletics without a scholarship, who play at least 35 hours and spend at most 2 hours per week on that sport?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played >= 35 AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N' AND sportsinfo.sportname = 'Athletics' AND sportsinfo.hoursperweek <= 2 AND student.lname = 'Smith' AND student.fname = 'Linda' AND student.major >= 600
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN Plays_Games AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID INNER JOIN SportsInfo AS T3 ON T1.StuID = T3.StuID WHERE T1.LName = 'Smith' AND T1.Fname = 'Linda' AND T1.Major >= 600 AND T2.Hours_Played >= 35 AND T3.OnScholarship = 'N' AND T3.SportName = 'Athletics' AND T3.HoursPerWeek <= 2

records.question: Which female students with the last name Smith, aged at least 18, advised by 1121, have played games for exactly 35 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE student.sex = 'F' AND student.advisor = 1121 AND plays_games.hours_played = 35 AND student.lname = 'Smith' AND student.age >= 18
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN Plays_Games AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID INNER JOIN SportsInfo AS T3 ON T1.StuID = T3.StuID WHERE T1.Sex = 'F' AND T1.Advisor = 1121 AND T1.LName = 'Smith' AND T1.Age >= 18 AND T2.Hours_Played = 35

records.question: Which students have played no more than 15 hours of games but have participated in at least 5 games overall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played <= 15 AND sportsinfo.gamesplayed >= 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Plays_Games AS T2 WHERE T1.StuID = T2.StuID AND T2.Hours_Played <= 15 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SportsInfo AS T3 WHERE T1.StuID = T3.StuID AND T3.GamesPlayed >= 5 )

records.question: Which students from the city where the code is BAL play video games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN video_games ON plays_games.gameid = video_games.gameid
WHERE student.city_code = 'BAL'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN Plays_Games AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID INNER JOIN Video_Games AS T3 ON T2.GameID = T3.GameID WHERE T1.city_code = 'BAL'
